'''fasoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicking|nicking]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-s-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicking|nicking]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fasoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæseyeth|fæseyeth]] || [[word:fæseyej|fæseyej]] || [[word:fæseyesh|fæseyesh]] || [[word:fæseye|fæseye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fasosoyoth|fasosoyoth]] || [[word:fasosoyoj|fasosoyoj]] || [[word:fasosoyosh|fasosoyosh]] || [[word:fasosoyo|fasosoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fasoyoth|fasoyoth]] || [[word:fasoyoj|fasoyoj]] || [[word:fasoyosh|fasoyosh]] || [[word:fasoyo|fasoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fasofyoth|fasofyoth]] || [[word:fasofyoj|fasofyoj]] || [[word:fasofyosh|fasofyosh]] || [[word:fasofyof|fasofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fasoyotho|fasoyotho]] || [[word:fasoyojo|fasoyojo]] || [[word:fasoyosho|fasoyosho]] || [[word:fasoyoko|fasoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fasoyoth|fasoyoth]] || [[word:fasoyoj|fasoyoj]] || [[word:fasoyosh|fasoyosh]] || [[word:fasoyo|fasoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fasoyothol|fasoyothol]] || [[word:fasoyojol|fasoyojol]] || [[word:fasoyoshol|fasoyoshol]] || [[word:fasoyokol|fasoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fasoyothotho|fasoyothotho]] || [[word:fasoyojojo|fasoyojojo]] || [[word:fasoyoshosho|fasoyoshosho]] || [[word:fasoyoko|fasoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fasoyothon|fasoyothon]] || [[word:fasoyojon|fasoyojon]] || [[word:fasoyoshon|fasoyoshon]] || [[word:fasoyokon|fasoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fasoyothoro|fasoyothoro]] || [[word:fasoyojoro|fasoyojoro]] || [[word:fasoyoshoro|fasoyoshoro]] || [[word:fasoyokoro|fasoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
